## Page Metadata
Page number: 363
Source document page number: 140
Handwritten page number: 514

## Layout And Reading Order
The page features a two-column header with a handwritten number "514" on the left and a printed number "140" on the right. The main content consists of several articles, each with a heading "Artikel [number]" followed by one or more paragraphs of text. Some paragraphs are indented. The text flows in a single column down the page.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         ## Completeness Audit
The transcription accurately captures all visible text on the page, including the header numbers, article headings, and the content within each article, preserving line breaks and indentation. No truncation was necessary.
